studyGuide.title: Key Points
studyGuide.content:
• Life processes are basic functions performed by living organisms to maintain their life on earth.
• Nutrition: The process of intake of nutrients and its utilization.
• Respiration: The process of releasing energy from food.
• Transportation: Movement of substances like food, oxygen, and waste inside the body.
• Excretion: Removal of harmful metabolic wastes from the body.

studyGuide.title: Important Definitions
studyGuide.content:
• Autotrophic Nutrition: Organisms make their own food from simple inorganic substances (e.g., Green plants).
• Heterotrophic Nutrition: Organisms depend on other organisms for food.
• Photosynthesis: Process by which plants prepare food using CO2, H2O, and Sunlight.
• Transpiration: Loss of water in the form of vapor from aerial parts of the plant.
